subcodes.first_line: Remember thy Lord at morn and eventide, for verily He is God; there is none other God but Him, the Almighty, the Most High. Say: He is indeed a proof from God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اذکری ربک فیکل صباح و عشی و انه هو الله لا اله الا هو العزیز العلی قولی انه لحجه من الله
subcodes.subjects: @prophecy and fulfillment, @banishment to; life in Constantinople, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @praise and encouragement
